lines: Hazaaron khwahishein aisi ke har khwahish pe dam nikle
Bahut nikle mere armaan lekin phir bhi kam nikle
poems.meaning: A thousand desires, each worth dying for. Many were fulfilled, yet they still feel too few.

lines: Dil-e-naadaan tujhe hua kya hai
Aakhir is dard ki dawa kya hai
poems.meaning: O naive heart, what has happened to you? What, after all, is the cure for this pain?

lines: Ishq par zor nahin hai ye woh aatish 'Ghalib'
Ke lagaye na lage aur bujhaye na bane
poems.meaning: Love obeys no command, Ghalib — it is a fire that cannot be lit at will, nor extinguished by effort.

lines: Ye na thi hamari qismat ke visaal-e-yaar hota
Agar aur jeete rehte yahi intezaar hota
poems.meaning: Union with the beloved was never my destiny. Had I lived longer, the wait would have simply gone on.

lines: Hui muddat ke 'Ghalib' mar gaya par yaad aata hai
Woh har ik baat pe kehna ke yoon hota to kya hota
poems.meaning: It has been long since Ghalib died, yet one remembers his way of asking at every turn: what if it had been so?

lines: Un ke dekhe se jo aa jaati hai munh par raunaq
Woh samajhte hain ke beemar ka haal achha hai
poems.meaning: The glow that lights my face upon seeing them — they mistake it for a sign that the ailing one is well.

lines: Patta patta boota boota haal hamara jaane hai
Jaane na jaane gul hi na jaane baagh to saara jaane hai
poems.meaning: Every leaf, every shrub knows my condition. Only the rose remains unaware, though the whole garden knows.

lines: Dekh to dil ke jaan se uthta hai
Ye dhuan sa kahan se uthta hai
poems.meaning: Look — does it rise from the heart or from the soul itself? Where does this smoke-like ache come from?

lines: Ishq ik 'Mir' bhaari patthar hai
Kab ye tujh naatavaan se uthta hai
poems.meaning: Love, O Mir, is a heavy stone — how will one as frail as you ever lift it?

lines: Hasti apni habaab ki si hai
Ye numaish saraab ki si hai
poems.meaning: Our existence is like a bubble on water; this whole display is like a mirage.

lines: Khudi ko kar buland itna ke har taqdeer se pehle
Khuda bande se khud poochhe bata teri raza kya hai
poems.meaning: Elevate your selfhood so high that before writing every destiny, God Himself asks: tell me, what is your wish?

lines: Sitaron se aage jahan aur bhi hain
Abhi ishq ke imtihan aur bhi hain
poems.meaning: Beyond the stars lie worlds yet unseen; love's trials are far from over.

lines: Nahin tera nasheman qasr-e-sultani ke gumbad par
Tu shaheen hai basera kar pahaadon ki chattanon mein
poems.meaning: Your nest does not belong on the dome of royal palaces. You are a falcon — make your home on mountain cliffs.

lines: Acha hai dil ke saath rahe paasban-e-aql
Lekin kabhi kabhi ise tanha bhi chhod de
poems.meaning: It is good that reason stands guard over the heart — but every now and then, leave the heart alone.

lines: Urdu hai jis ka naam hamin jaante hain 'Daagh'
Saare jahan mein dhoom hamari zabaan ki hai
poems.meaning: The language called Urdu — we know it well, Daagh. Our tongue is celebrated across the whole world.

lines: Gazab kiya tere waade pe aitbaar kiya
Tamaam raat qayamat ka intezaar kiya
poems.meaning: What a folly — I trusted your promise, and waited all night for a doomsday that never came.

lines: Tumhare khat mein naya ik salaam kis ka tha
Na tha raqeeb to aakhir woh naam kis ka tha
poems.meaning: Whose new greeting was that in your letter? If not my rival's, then whose name was it, after all?

lines: Tum mere paas hote ho goya
Jab koi doosra nahin hota
poems.meaning: You are with me, as it were, whenever no one else is.

lines: Woh jo hum mein tum mein qaraar tha tumhein yaad ho ke na yaad ho
Wahi yaani waada nibaah ka tumhein yaad ho ke na yaad ho
poems.meaning: That understanding between you and me — you may remember it or not. That very promise of faithfulness — you may remember it or not.

lines: Layi hayaat aaye qaza le chali chale
Apni khushi na aaye na apni khushi chale
poems.meaning: Life brought us, so we came; death takes us, so we go. We neither came of our own will, nor leave by it.

lines: Ab to ghabra ke ye kehte hain ke mar jayenge
Mar ke bhi chain na paya to kidhar jayenge
poems.meaning: In despair we say we shall simply die — but if there is no peace even in death, where shall we go?

lines: Sarakti jaye hai rukh se naqaab aahista aahista
Nikalta aa raha hai aaftaab aahista aahista
poems.meaning: The veil slips from the face, slowly, slowly — the sun emerges, slowly, slowly.

lines: Tohmatein chand apne zimme dhar chale
Jis liye aaye the so hum kar chale
poems.meaning: A few accusations we took upon ourselves and left; what we came to do, we did, and departed.

lines: Ragon mein daudte phirne ke hum nahin qaail
Jab aankh hi se na tapka to phir lahu kya hai
poems.meaning: Merely coursing through the veins does not impress me — if it never fell from the eye as tears, what kind of blood is it?

lines: Le saans bhi aahista ke naazuk hai bahut kaam
Aafaaq ki is kaargah-e-sheesha-gari ka
poems.meaning: Breathe softly, for delicate is the work of this glass-blower's workshop that is the universe.
